example_tasks: Compare performance of GPT-4 and Claude 3
Align team goals with company strategy
Standardize naming conventions for project files
Evaluate pros and cons of cloud providers
Calculate the difference between two datasets
Balance the workload across the team
Verify parity between staging and production
reasoning: The icon represents equality or comparison. It is useful for tasks involving analytical comparison, balancing, or ensuring parity between two entities, but is too abstract for general task management.
